title: Control of Goods, Prices and Other Charges
title_en: Control of Goods, Prices and Other Charges

provisions.title: </a">1. Short title
provisions.content:
</a">1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Control of Goods, Prices and Other Charges Act.

provisions.title: </a">2. Interpretation
provisions.content:
</a">2. Interpretation
In this Act, unless the context otherwise requires—
"goods" means anything capable of being bought or sold, whether manufactured or not.

provisions.title: Regulations
provisions.content:
3. Regulations
(1) Whenever it appears to the Minister necessary or expedient to control—

definitions.definition: anything capable of being bought or sold, whether manufactured or not.
